appliedUpdates.description: Marked VAL-BASE-004 and VAL-BASE-007 passed after rerunning the isolated zero-live validation flow with the default SQLite snapshot file temporarily moved aside to reproduce the repository-tested zero-live startup state.
Superseded earlier zero-live attempts that inherited seeded bootstrap state from an existing validation process or persistent snapshot source; authoritative evidence is in zero-live-rerun-2.json.
